title: Incorrect signal expansion with unsigned variables causes wrong simulation result

features.name: unsigned variable with non-zero-based bit range selection
features.description: Code should include a bit-select from an unsigned reg/wire declared with non-zero-based range like [27:5] or [26:11]

features.name: concatenation with replication and zero padding
features.description: Code should include a concatenation with replication constant and a part-select from an unsigned variable

features.name: split bit-range assignment to wire from expression
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment to non-contiguous bit ranges of a wire from an expression

features.name: ternary operator with unsigned operands and bit-select
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional operator where all operands are unsigned bit-selects or constants
